title: Stenanthemum tridentatum
taxonomy: Stenanthemum tridentatum is a member of the family Rhamnaceae. It belongs to the genus Stenanthemum. This species is a shrub native to Western Australia. Stenanthemum tridentatum is a part of the class Magnoliopsida, which includes flowering plants with two cotyledons. The species can be further classified under the subclass Rosidae, which contains families of plants with a three-layered perianth.
